---
title: ""
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
listing:
  - id: future-activities
    contents: engagements/future/*.qmd
    type: grid
    categories: true
    sort: "date asc"
    fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
    page-size: 12
  - id: past-activities
    contents: engagements/past/*.qmd
    type: grid
    categories: true
    sort: "date desc"
    fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
    page-size: 12
---

```{=html}
<style>
.site-page {
  --site-accent: #426b73;
  --site-accent-soft: #e7f0f1;
  --site-ink: #1f2933;
  --site-muted: #5f6f7a;
  --site-line: #d7e1e4;
  --site-bg: #ffffff;
}

.site-intro,
.site-section {
  max-width: 1120px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 3.5rem 1.5rem;
}

.site-intro {
  padding-top: 2rem;
  padding-bottom: 2.5rem;
}

.site-kicker {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.14em;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  color: var(--site-accent);
  font-weight: 700;
  margin-bottom: 0.9rem;
}

.site-intro h2 {
  font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 5vw, 4rem);
  line-height: 1;
  margin: 0 0 1.2rem;
  color: var(--site-ink);
}

.site-lede {
  max-width: 900px;
  font-size: 1.12rem;
  line-height: 1.75;
  color: var(--site-ink);
}

.site-muted {
  color: var(--site-muted);
}

.site-band {
  background: #f7fafb;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--site-line);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--site-line);
}

.site-section-title {
  font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 3vw, 2.3rem);
  margin: 0 0 1.2rem;
  color: var(--site-ink);
}

.site-section p,
.site-section li {
  line-height: 1.65;
}
</style>


<div class="site-page">

<section class="site-intro">
  <div class="site-kicker">Events · Outreach · Public engagement</div>
  <h2>Engagements</h2>
  <div class="site-lede">
    <p>Selected talks, workshops, panels, podcasts, public programs, and other events where I share, test, and develop ideas with wider communities.</p>
    <p><span class="site-muted">This page is organised as a living archive of future and past engagements.</span></p>
  </div>
</section>
<section class="site-section">
  <p>This page collects talks, workshops, panels, podcasts, public programs, and other events I have participated in or will participate in.</p>

  <h2 class="site-section-title">Future activities</h2>

  {#future-activities}
  

  <h2 class="site-section-title">Past activities</h2>

  {#past-activities}
  
</section>

</div>
```
